regional_cost_note: Arborists in Hamilton typically charge $550–$1,800 for small tree removal and $2,200–$9,000+ for large trees. Stump grinding is $220–$650 per stump. Waikato rates are generally 10–15% below Auckland for most trades. Ensure your arborist holds NZ Arboricultural Association accreditation and has current public liability insurance.
